Defines and manages flash memory regions, erasure functions, and chip-specific configurations for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[filesystem_regions.c](filesystem_regions.c.md)**: Erases all filesystem regions by iterating through a list and calling a flash erase function.
- **[filesystem_regions.h](filesystem_regions.h.md)**: Defines and manages filesystem regions in flash memory, ensuring sector alignment and providing erase functionality.
- **[filesystem_regions_n25q.h](filesystem_regions_n25q.h.md)**: Defines flash regions for the filesystem used by the serial flash chip in Tintin/Bianca devices.
- **[flash_region.c](flash_region.c.md)**: Functions for optimal flash memory erasure with optional task watchdog feeding.
- **[flash_region.h](flash_region.h.md)**: Defines flash memory region sizes and provides deprecated functions for optimal flash erasure.
- **[flash_region_def_helper.h](flash_region_def_helper.h.md)**: Defines macros and enumerations for managing flash memory regions, including address calculations and size checks.
- **[flash_region_gd25lq255e.h](flash_region_gd25lq255e.h.md)**: Defines flash memory regions and their addresses for the GD25LQ255E chip in the Pebble firmware.
- **[flash_region_mt25q.h](flash_region_mt25q.h.md)**: Defines flash memory regions and their addresses for the MT25Q flash in the Pebble firmware.
- **[flash_region_mx25u.h](flash_region_mx25u.h.md)**: Defines flash memory regions and their addresses for the MX25U chip in the Pebble firmware.
- **[flash_region_n25q.h](flash_region_n25q.h.md)**: Defines memory layout and constants for flash regions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[flash_region_s29vs.h](flash_region_s29vs.h.md)**: Defines memory layout and constants for flash regions in the Pebble firmware, including sector sizes and addresses.
